memoryArtifacts.description:
The Entwisties of Entwistle
   One of several theories concerning the Entwistle family name has it as of Norman French origin, and that the early family members had acquired their lands as Norman Baro …

zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistle是Thomas Entwisle的兒子，於大約1091年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾霍爾頓。他於大約1113年與Mrs. Elisabeth Entwhisle在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年享年39歲。

en.Chorlton upon Medlock, Lancashire, Engla: Chorlton-on-Medlock, Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Entwistle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Entwistle (Lancashire), from Old English henna ‘(water) hen’ or ened ‘duck’ + twisla ‘tongue of land in a river fork’.

variants.name: Antisdel
meanings: English: variant of Antisell, itself one of the many post-medieval variants of Entwistle .
History: Lawrence Antisell or Antisdel or Antisdale (1688–1759), from Lancashire, married Mary Armstrong in Norwich, New London, CT, in 1730.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Seymore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Seymour
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a Norman baronial name from Saint-Maur in Normandy. This place was so called from the dedication of its church to St Maurus ( compare Maurice ).

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistle was born about 1091, in Chorlton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas Entwisle. He married Mrs. Elisabeth Entwhisle about 1113, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1129, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistle est né environ 1091, à Chorlton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas Entwisle. Il a épousé Mrs. Elisabeth Entwhisle environ 1113, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1129, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistleは約1091年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアチオルルトンでThomas Entwisleの息子として生まれた。約1113年にイギリスでMrs. Elisabeth Entwhisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistle(은)는 대략 1091년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 초를턴에서 Thomas Entwisle의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1113년 영국에서 Mrs. Elisabeth Entwhisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Seymore Entwistle родился около 1091 г. в местности чаурлтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Thomas Entwisle. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Elisabeth Entwhisle около 1113 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1129 г. в возрасте 39 лет.
